name: keep-computer-on-in-your-backpack
description: A macOS menu bar app that keeps your laptop awake with the lid closed while letting the screen turn off.

scripts.test: node --check bin/install.mjs && zsh -n install.sh && zsh -n scripts/backpack-awake-controller && plutil -lint Info.plist scripts/com.declankramper.backpack-awake-controller.plist
